module.name: CRM
module.description: Sales workspace replacing CRM handoff gaps, with quote and order handoff built in.

fields.label: Sales Entity
fields.help_text: Choose the selling entity for this record. Sales users only retain access to records in their assigned entity.

fields.label: Status
fields.help_text: Lead workflow status. Use the status bar/actions to move the lead through the CRM process.

fields.label: Sales Entity
fields.help_text: Choose the selling entity before saving. NLight BV and EcoTech/CIS sales teams only see records assigned to their own entity.

fields.label: Contact Name
fields.help_text: Auto-filled from the selected contact person, but can be typed manually for new leads before the person record exists.

fields.label: Contact Email
fields.help_text: Auto-filled from the selected contact person or company. Editable so lead contact details are not lost when the person has not been created yet.

fields.label: Contact Phone
fields.help_text: Auto-filled from the selected contact person or company. Editable so call details can be captured directly on the lead.

fields.label: Sales Entity
fields.help_text: Choose the selling entity for this opportunity. Qualified leads copy this automatically.

fields.label: Primary Contact
fields.help_text: Auto-filled from the selected contact person, but can be typed manually when the person record is not yet available.

fields.label: Contact Email
fields.help_text: Auto-filled from the selected contact person or company. Editable so opportunity contact details remain visible after reload.

fields.label: Contact Phone
fields.help_text: Auto-filled from the selected contact person or company. Editable so phone details can be captured directly on the opportunity.

fields.label: Source Lead
fields.help_text: Filled when this opportunity is created by qualifying a lead, so lead activity context remains visible.

fields.label: Stage
fields.help_text: Main opportunity workflow stage. This drives the status bar, kanban columns, workflow buttons, and reporting.

fields.label: Status
fields.help_text: Derived lifecycle state used for imports/reporting. In normal use, move opportunities with the Stage bar and action buttons instead.

fields.label: Sector
fields.help_text: Commercial sector for reporting and handover, for example greenhouse, vertical farm, research, or propagation.

fields.label: Type of Crop
fields.help_text: Primary crop or crop group for the opportunity.

fields.label: Products
fields.help_text: Products, product family, or system type discussed with the customer.

fields.label: Spectrum
fields.help_text: Spectrum or lighting recipe requirement discussed for this opportunity.

fields.label: Company Address
fields.help_text: Customer company address snapshot for opportunity context.

fields.label: Site Address
fields.help_text: Project/site address snapshot for opportunity context.

fields.label: Sales Entity
fields.help_text: Choose the selling entity for this activity. Activities created from leads, opportunities, or sites copy this automatically.

fields.label: Completed Date
fields.help_text: Set when the activity is marked done.

modals.title: Disqualify Lead
modals.description: Capture why this enquiry should not move into the sales pipeline.

modals.title: Mark Opportunity Lost
modals.description: Capture the loss reason so the pipeline remains useful.
